title: Tebra - All-in-One EHR+ Platform with Real-Time Eligibility
problem: Private practices need integrated EHR, billing, scheduling, and marketing tools. Disconnected systems create inefficiencies and revenue leakage.
solution: EHR+ platform combining clinical, billing, scheduling, and marketing. Real-time insurance eligibility verification, claims management, AI Note Assist for clinical documentation. One platform for entire practice.
technology: Cloud-based EHR, AI Note Assist, real-time eligibility APIs, claims processing
ai_type: AI for clinical notes, eligibility automation
varden_fit: HIGH — Tebra proves integrated EHR + eligibility + billing works for private practices. European clinics need similar integrated tools.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Practice management software is crowded but essential. Real-time eligibility embedded in workflow is the key differentiator.
